_comment: Registry for bin/check-windows-link-contract.py (inventory row WIN-ACT-005, links). Names the two link surfaces -- the native FixedHyperlink and its weld::LinkButton wrapper -- plus the Material token side the interaction contract of docs/design/02-actions.md 5 depends on: a @primary focus outline at corner-focus radius replacing the platform focus rectangle, a hover that keeps the underline with no color tint, a disabled state rendering deactiveTextColor (@outline) as plain non-underlined non-focusable text, and an exposed visited state (@visited-link). Source evidence only: no native build, link pixels, or runtime interaction are claimed.
